title: ProjectMetadata
description: Top-level config for a ledger-managed project. Lives at .ledger/project.json. Schema version 1.

schemaVersion.description: Authored explicitly by the operator; bumps on breaking schema changes.

name.description: Human-readable project name shown in the topbar.

docs.description: Relative path from the project root to the docs tree, e.g. "docs". No leading or trailing slash. Path-traversal segments (..) are NOT rejected by this schema; the API server consuming this field must treat it as untrusted operator input and reject .. segments + assert containment under the project root before any filesystem read. See 03-project-metadata Open Issues for the delegation.

agent.description: Identifier of the agent runtime used to dispatch tasks. v1 recommends "claude-code"; no enum enforced.

health.description: Health scanner thresholds. All fields optional; defaults apply when omitted.

sizeThresholdTokens.description: Estimated token count above which a doc triggers a size finding. Default: 3000.

orphanThresholdDays.description: Days with non-empty Open Issues before an orphan finding. Default: 14.
